text: A yellow and red bus, possibly a trolley or tram, moving down a street. The bus has large windows and a decorative yellow stripe near the bottom. Text visible on the side includes 'Stn.' and 'Emergency Exit' on the left, and 'PICO' on the right. A person is leaning out of the driver's window. The background shows white buildings and trees.
